steps.title: Model the savings
steps.content:
Harper saves $\frac{1}{6}$ of salary $h$, and Wesley saves $\frac{3}{8}$ of salary $w$. Their combined savings are $2{,}850$ dollars:
$$
\frac{1}{6}h+\frac{3}{8}w=2{,}850
$$

steps.title: Clear the fractions
steps.content:
The least common multiple of $6$ and $8$ is $24$. Multiply every term by $24$:
$$
4h+9w=68{,}400
$$

steps.title: Match the equation
steps.content: The equation $4h+9w=68{,}400$ matches the relationship. The answer is D.
